explanation: This is the original command line and serves as a baseline for testing the Sigma rule.
Inserted a comma after 'comsvcs.dll' to test parsing flexibility while maintaining functionality.
Used double quotes around the executable path to test quote insertion as a bypass technique.
Removed quotes around the output file path to test if the rule detects quoted vs unquoted paths.
Reordered the command line arguments to test if the rule is sensitive to argument order.
Used short path notation (e.g., C:\\Users\\thaim instead of C:\\Users\\thaim) to test path normalization bypass.
Used environment variables for the output file path to test if the rule is sensitive to dynamic path generation.
Used escape characters to obscure the command line while maintaining functionality.
